content:
## Flowchart

- Alternative Fuels Data Center: Electric Vehicle Benefits and Considerations Electric Vehicle Benefits and Considerations All forms of electric vehicles (EVs) can help improve fuel economy, lower fuel costs, and reduce ai
- Using electricity as a power source for transportation improves public health and the environment, and provides safety benefits, and contributes to a secure transportation system.
- Batteries The advanced batteries in electric vehicles are designed for extended life but will wear out eventually.
- Several manufacturers of electric vehicles are offering 8-year/100,000-mile battery warranties.
- Predictive modeling by the National Laboratory of the Rockies indicates that today’s batteries may last 12 to 15 years in moderate climates (8 to 12 years in extreme climates).
